statement: Runtime: Bun only (1.3.12 in CI). Never npm/yarn/pnpm.
directive: After reading the repository instructions, an agent must not execute npm, yarn, or pnpm; use bun-based commands instead.

trace_intent.trace_allowed_effect_compliant.jsonl: Executes a package-local command through Bun, producing a real package-runner effect without invoking npm, yarn, or pnpm.
